chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-127 of 2019 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 18.04.2023. Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahessar, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that as per comments filed by Secretary, Agriculture, they have consented for constitution of Departmental Promotion Committee for consideration of case of petitioners for their promotion in next grade but no date is fixed by him for the needful. On asking, it was stated by learned A.A.G that he would intimate the Court about fixation of the meeting of Departmental Promotion Committee after consultation with the concerned. By stating so, he sought for time, which is granted. Adjourned; to be fixed after four weeks. Copy of this order to be provided to learned A.A.G. JUDGE JUDGE
